description:
ID for the leopard shark.  Was shocked to see this adult male sea lion chasing down a leopard shark.  Even dropped it at one point and caught it again.  Then swam further out and spent 20 minutes flinging it around violently and attracted a crowd of birds.  Didn't realize leopard sharks were on the menu.  Managed to get a video:

description: Resting on sea floor in tide pools

Leopard Shark observed on July 16th, 2025, at 6:17 PM, with a temperature of 83 degrees Farenheight. This species was observed swimming in the shallow warm waters of La Jolla shores, between the Marine Room and the kayak station. Other species around this included shovelnose guitarfish, other leopard sharks, and a variety of fish species.
